response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside deep backend expertise in databases and cloud platforms. Her recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and her consistent track record of shipping scalable solutions align closely with the role's requirements. Her entrepreneurial background and diverse stack exposure further highlight her problem-solving and architectural skills.
strengths: Directly relevant fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven ability to build scalable systems and optimize performance
Strong background in AI-agent development and diverse technical stacks
concerns: Limited experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework required
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework experience
Minimal exposure to Kotlin/Java, the secondary backend languages
